title: TapTrack
description: An advanced QR/RFID attendance ecosystem featuring real-time automated WhatsApp alerts and a sophisticated administrative interface for streamlined student tracking.

title: PresenBot
description: A sophisticated attendance monitoring ecosystem utilizing WhatsApp and Telegram APIs for synchronous student tracking and comprehensive reporting.

title: SariWangi
description: A bespoke POS ecosystem architected to streamline laundry operations through automated transaction tracking and comprehensive fiscal auditing.

title: Collabra
description: A sophisticated, Laravel-driven ecosystem orchestrating seamless ticket tracking, epic workflows, and secure client collaboration via a high-performance Filament interface.

title: PharmPOS
description: An avant-garde, multi-platform pharmacy management ecosystem that synergizes a robust Laravel-Filament administrative backend with a high-performance Flutter POS interface, streamlining inventory, sales, and fiscal operations with integrated payment gateways and thermal printing capabilities.

title: GlowUp
description: A premier, full-stack management ecosystem for the aesthetics industry, synergizing a robust Laravel administrative core with a high-fidelity Flutter interface to streamline clinical operations and financial performance.
